# Project Epsilon

Internal tooling improvements.

## Status

Completed - December 2023

## Overview

Project Epsilon improved internal developer tooling. It was completed ahead of schedule.

## Team

- **Lead**: Frank Wilson
- **Contributors**: Alice Chen, Bob Martinez

## Outcomes

1. ✅ New CI/CD pipeline (50% faster builds)
2. ✅ Automated testing framework
3. ✅ Developer documentation portal
4. ✅ Local development environment

## Lessons Learned

- Early stakeholder involvement was key
- Incremental rollout reduced risk
- Documentation improved adoption
